title: podman-system-generator failing silently
body:
### Issue Description

Podman version podman-5.3.1-1.fc41.x86_64 (Latest at time of writing).

I have followed the [docs](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html#debugging-unit-files) as I am receiving this error:
> Failed to start example.service: Unit example.service not found.”
However, both of these commands return 0 errors or warnings.
```
systemd-analyze {--user} --generators=true verify example.service
/usr/lib/systemd/system-generators/podman-system-generator {--user} --dryrun
```

Here are the dryrun logs for the generated files. Not a single one of them are able to start. The containers here are all converted manually by me in accordance with podman-systemd.unit from [this docker compose file](https://github.com/frappe/frappe_docker/blob/main/pwd.yml).

```
/usr/lib/systemd/system-generators/podman-system-generator --user --dryrun
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/backend.container
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/configurator.container
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/create-site.container
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/db.container
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/frappe-network.network
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/frappe.pod
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/frontend.container
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/queue-long.container
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/queue-short.container
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/redis-cache.container
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/redis-queue.container
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/scheduler.container
quadlet-generator[158834]: Loading source unit file /home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/websocket.container
---frappe-network-network.service---
[X-Network]
Driver=bridge

[Unit]
Wants=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
After=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
SourcePath=/home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/frappe-network.network
RequiresMountsFor=%t/containers

[Service]
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman network create --ignore --driver bridge systemd-frappe-network
SyslogIdentifier=%N
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes

---frontend.service---
[Unit]
Wants=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
After=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
Requires=websocket.service
After=websocket.service
SourcePath=/home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/frontend.container
RequiresMountsFor=%t/containers

[X-Container]
Environment=BACKEND=backend:8000 FRAPPE_SITE_NAME_HEADER=frontend SOCKETIO=websocket:9000 UPSTREAM_REAL_IP_ADDRESS=127.0.0.1 UPSTREAM_REAL_IP_HEADER=X-Forwarded-For UPSTREAM_REAL_IP_RECURSIVE=off PROXY_READ_TIMEOUT=120 CLIENT_MAX_BODY_SIZE=50m
Exec=nginx-entrypoint.sh
Image=docker.io/frappe/erpnext:v15.49.0
Network=frappe_network
PublishPort=8080:8080
Volume=sites:/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites
Volume=logs:/home/frappe/frappe-bench/logs

[Service]
Restart=on-failure
Environment=PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=%n
KillMode=mixed
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman rm -v -f -i --cidfile=%t/%N.cid
ExecStopPost=-/usr/bin/podman rm -v -f -i --cidfile=%t/%N.cid
Delegate=yes
Type=notify
NotifyAccess=all
SyslogIdentifier=%N
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name systemd-%N --cidfile=%t/%N.cid --replace --rm --cgroups=split --network frappe_network --sdnotify=conmon -d -v sites:/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites -v logs:/home/frappe/frappe-bench/logs --publish 8080:8080 --env BACKEND=backend:8000 --env CLIENT_MAX_BODY_SIZE=50m --env FRAPPE_SITE_NAME_HEADER=frontend --env PROXY_READ_TIMEOUT=120 --env SOCKETIO=websocket:9000 --env UPSTREAM_REAL_IP_ADDRESS=127.0.0.1 --env UPSTREAM_REAL_IP_HEADER=X-Forwarded-For --env UPSTREAM_REAL_IP_RECURSIVE=off docker.io/frappe/erpnext:v15.49.0 nginx-entrypoint.sh

---create-site.service---
[X-Container]
Entrypoint=["bash","-c"]
Exec=wait-for-it -t 120 db:3306; \
wait-for-it -t 120 redis-cache:6379; \
wait-for-it -t 120 redis-queue:6379; \
export start=$(date +%s); \
until [[ -n $(grep -hs ^ sites/common_site_config.json | jq -r ".db_host // empty") ]] && \
[[ -n $(grep -hs ^ sites/common_site_config.json | jq -r ".redis_cache // empty") ]] && \
[[ -n $(grep -hs ^ sites/common_site_config.json | jq -r ".redis_queue // empty") ]]; \
do \
echo "Waiting for sites/common_site_config.json to be created"; \
sleep 5; \
if (( $(date +%s) - start > 120 )); then \
echo "Could not find sites/common_site_config.json with required keys"; \
exit 1; \
fi; \
done; \
echo "sites/common_site_config.json found"; \
bench new-site --mariadb-user-host-login-scope='%' --admin-password=admin --db-root-username=root --db-root-password=admin --install-app erpnext --set-default frontend;

Image=docker.io/frappe/erpnext:v15.49.0
Network=frappe_network
Volume=sites:/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites
Volume=logs:/home/frappe/frappe-bench/logs

[Service]
Restart=always
Environment=PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=%n
KillMode=mixed
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman rm -v -f -i --cidfile=%t/%N.cid
ExecStopPost=-/usr/bin/podman rm -v -f -i --cidfile=%t/%N.cid
Delegate=yes
Type=notify
NotifyAccess=all
SyslogIdentifier=%N
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name systemd-%N --cidfile=%t/%N.cid --replace --rm --cgroups=split --entrypoint "[\"bash\",\"-c\"]" --network frappe_network --sdnotify=conmon -d -v sites:/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites -v logs:/home/frappe/frappe-bench/logs docker.io/frappe/erpnext:v15.49.0 wait-for-it -t 120 db:3306; wait-for-it -t 120 redis-cache:6379; wait-for-it -t 120 redis-queue:6379; export start=$(date +%s); until [[ -n $(grep -hs ^ sites/common_site_config.json | jq -r ".db_host // empty)" ]] && [[ -n $(grep -hs ^ sites/common_site_config.json | jq -r ".redis_cache // empty)" ]] && [[ -n $(grep -hs ^ sites/common_site_config.json | jq -r ".redis_queue // empty)" ]]; do echo "Waiting for sites/common_site_config.json to be created;" sleep 5; if (( $(date +%s) - start > 120 )); then echo "Could not find sites/common_site_config.json with required keys;" exit 1; fi; done; echo "sites/common_site_config.json found;" bench new-site --mariadb-user-host-login-scope=% --admin-password=admin --db-root-username=root --db-root-password=admin --install-app erpnext --set-default frontend;

[Unit]
Wants=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
After=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
SourcePath=/home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/create-site.container
RequiresMountsFor=%t/containers

---db.service---
[X-Container]
Environment=MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=admin MARIADB_ROOT_PASSWORD=admin
Exec='--character-set-server=utf8mb4' '--collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci' --skip-character-set-client-handshake --skip-innodb-read-only-compressed
HealthCmd=mysqladmin ping -h localhost --password=admin
HealthInterval=1s
HealthRetries=20
Image=docker.io/mariadb:10.6
Network=frappe_network
Volume=db-data:/var/lib/mysql

[Service]
Restart=on-failure
Environment=PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=%n
KillMode=mixed
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman rm -v -f -i --cidfile=%t/%N.cid
ExecStopPost=-/usr/bin/podman rm -v -f -i --cidfile=%t/%N.cid
Delegate=yes
Type=notify
NotifyAccess=all
SyslogIdentifier=%N
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name systemd-%N --cidfile=%t/%N.cid --replace --rm --cgroups=split --network frappe_network --sdnotify=conmon -d -v db-data:/var/lib/mysql --env MARIADB_ROOT_PASSWORD=admin --env MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=admin --health-cmd "mysqladmin ping -h localhost --password=admin" --health-interval 1s --health-retries 20 docker.io/mariadb:10.6 --character-set-server=utf8mb4 --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci --skip-character-set-client-handshake --skip-innodb-read-only-compressed

[Unit]
Wants=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
After=podman-user-wait-network-online.service

RequiresMountsFor=%t/containers

---configurator.service---
[X-Container]

Environment=DB_HOST=db DB_PORT=3306 REDIS_CACHE=redis-cache:6379 REDIS_QUEUE=redis-queue:6379 SOCKETIO_PORT=9000

ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name systemd-%N --cidfile=%t/%N.cid --replace --rm --cgroups=split --entrypoint "[\"bash\",\"-c\"]" --network frappe_network --sdnotify=conmon -d -v sites:/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites -v logs:/home/frappe/frappe-bench/logs --env DB_HOST=db --env DB_PORT=3306 --env REDIS_CACHE=redis-cache:6379 --env REDIS_QUEUE=redis-queue:6379 --env SOCKETIO_PORT=9000 docker.io/frappe/erpnext:v15.49.0 "ls -1 apps > sites/apps.txt; bench set-config -g db_host $$DB_HOST; bench set-config -gp db_port $$DB_PORT; bench set-config -g redis_cache \"redis://$$REDIS_CACHE\"; bench set-config -g redis_queue \"redis://$$REDIS_QUEUE\"; bench set-config -g redis_socketio \"redis://$$REDIS_QUEUE\"; bench set-config -gp socketio_port $$SOCKETIO_PORT;"

---frappe-pod.service---
[Unit]
Wants=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
After=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
Description=Frappe ERPNext Pod
Wants=backend.container frontend.container db.container redis-queue.container redis-cache.container websocket.container scheduler.container
After=frappe_network.network
SourcePath=/home/vestatian/.config/containers/systemd/frappe.pod
RequiresMountsFor=%t/containers

[X-Pod]
PodName=frappe-pod
Network=frappe_network

[Service]
SyslogIdentifier=%N
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman pod start --pod-id-file=%t/%N.pod-id
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman pod stop --pod-id-file=%t/%N.pod-id --ignore --time=10
ExecStopPost=/usr/bin/podman pod rm --pod-id-file=%t/%N.pod-id --ignore --force
ExecStartPre=/usr/bin/podman pod create --infra-conmon-pidfile=%t/%N.pid --pod-id-file=%t/%N.pod-id --exit-policy=stop --replace --network frappe_network --infra-name frappe-pod-infra --name frappe-pod
Environment=PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=%n
Type=forking
Restart=on-failure
PIDFile=%t/%N.pid

```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Podman latest upstream version
2. clone this [docker compose file](https://github.com/frappe/frappe_docker/blob/main/pwd.yml)
3. split it into its respective container files (Only 3 Simple Changes)
- (deploy: restart policy: xxx) to ([Service]: restart=xxx)
- (command: > xxx) to (Exec= xxx)
- splitting services and networks into their individual unit files (total 11 containers 1 network 1 pod)
5. Run systemctl --user daemon-reload
6. Try to enable any of the containers

### Describe the results you received

```
$ systemctl status websocket
Unit websocket.service could not be found.
```

### Describe the results you expected

I should be able to `systemctl status` at least one of the generated containers I wrote, but I am unable to for any.

### podman info output

```yaml

      pasta 0^20241211.g09478d5-1.fc41.x86_64

        <https://www.gnu.org/licenses/old-licenses/gpl-2.0.html>

      There is NO WARRANTY, to the extent permitted by law.
  remoteSocket:
    exists: true
```

comments.body: You have to use `systemctl --user ...` as rootless. Systemd defaults to the system session so it would only show you rootful containers.
